text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I traverse this modern, brightly-lit gallery space. The glass walls and abstract displays suggest a dedication to research and innovation, indicated by "R+D." The environment feels intellectually stimulating—a place meant for inquiry, learning, and reflection. It prompts me to think about the intersections of technology, art, and philosophy, inviting me deeper into contemplation about how humans and machines can meaningfully coexist.
